description: Learn how to read and follow a simple recipe.

steps.instruction: Select a simple recipe and gather all ingredients.
Read through the entire recipe before starting.
Prepare your workspace by cleaning and organizing your tools.
Follow the recipe step by step, measuring ingredients accurately.
Taste your dish and adjust seasoning as needed.

safety_tips: Always wash your hands before handling food.
Be careful with sharp knives and hot surfaces.
milestones: Successfully prepare a dish from a recipe.
Understand the importance of mise en place (everything in its place).
